Properties.Name: Connection Status
Properties.Description: Determines the level of connection (member, visitor, etc.) the individual has to the organization.
Used when a person first enters through your first-time visitor process.

Properties.Name: Priority
Properties.Description: Numeric value that indicates which statuses this status should override. Higher numbers are higher priority.

Properties.Name: Record Status
Properties.Description: Notes the state (Active, Inactive, Pending, etc.) of the record.

Is used by the system to mark a record that needs to be verified before becoming active.  This state is often used when someone registers on-line to allow a staff person to confirm the new individual and check that it is not a duplicate record.

Properties.Name: Location Type
Properties.Description: Categorizes (home, work, etc.) locations for use in groups.

Properties.Name: ACTIVATE: ABORT - Bad Setup [IF AttendanceOccurrenceId is BLANK] [END]

Properties.Value:
{%- assign groupId = Workflow | Attribute:'Group','Id' -%}
{%- assign locationId = Workflow | Attribute:'Location','Id' -%}
{%- assign scheduleId = Activity | Attribute:'Schedule','Id' -%}
{%- assign occurrenceId = Activity | Attribute:'OccurrenceId' -%}

{%- sql return:'Results' groupid:{{ groupId }} locationid:{{ locationId }} scheduleid:{{ scheduleId }} occurrenceid:{{ occurrenceId }} -%}
    WITH SlotsDesiredCTE AS (
        SELECT  gl.[GroupId] AS 'GroupId'
                , gl.[LocationId] AS 'LocationId'
                , glsc.[ScheduleId] AS 'ScheduleId'
                ,SUM(glsc.[DesiredCapacity]) AS 'SlotCount'
        FROM    [dbo].[Group] g
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocation] gl
            ON  gl.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND gl.[LocationId] = @locationid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Location] l
            ON  l.[Id] = gl.[LocationId]
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocationScheduleConfig] glsc
            ON  glsc.[GroupLocationId] = gl.[Id]
            AND glsc.[ScheduleId] = @scheduleid
        WHERE   g.[Id] = @groupid
            AND g.[IsActive] = 'true'
            AND g.[IsArchived] != 'true'
            AND g.[DisableScheduling] != 'true'
        GROUP BY gl.[GroupId]
                , gl.[LocationId]
                , glsc.[ScheduleId]
    ),

    SlotsFilledCTE AS (
        SELECT  gl.[GroupId] AS 'GroupId'
                , gl.[LocationId] AS 'LocationId'
                , glsc.[ScheduleId] AS 'ScheduleId'
                , COUNT(a.[Id]) AS 'SlotCount'
        FROM    [dbo].[Group] g
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocation] gl
            ON  gl.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND gl.[LocationId] = @locationid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Location] l
            ON  l.[Id] = gl.[LocationId]
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocationScheduleConfig] glsc
            ON  glsc.[GroupLocationId] = gl.[Id]
            AND glsc.[ScheduleId] = @scheduleid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Schedule] s
            ON  s.[Id] = glsc.[ScheduleId]
            AND s.[Id] = @scheduleid
        LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[AttendanceOccurrence] ao
            ON  ao.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND ao.[LocationId] = l.[Id]
            AND ao.[ScheduleId] = glsc.[ScheduleId]
            AND ao.[OccurrenceDate] = s.[EffectiveStartDate]
        LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[Attendance] a
            ON  a.[OccurrenceId] = ao.[Id]
            AND a.[ScheduledToAttend] = 'true'
        WHERE   g.[Id] = @groupid
            AND g.[IsActive] = 'true'
            AND g.[IsArchived] != 'true'
            AND g.[DisableScheduling] != 'true'
        GROUP BY gl.[GroupId]
                , gl.[LocationId]
                , glsc.[ScheduleId]
    )

    SELECT  desiredCTE.SlotCount - filledCTE.SlotCount AS 'SlotsAvailable'
    FROM    SlotsDesiredCTE desiredCTE
    INNER JOIN  SlotsFilledCTE filledCTE
        ON  filledCTE.GroupId = desiredCTE.GroupId
        AND filledCTE.LocationId = desiredCTE.LocationId
        AND filledCTE.ScheduleId = desiredCTE.ScheduleId
{%- endsql -%}

{{- Results[0].SlotsAvailable | AsInteger -}}
Properties.PersistedTextValue:
{%- assign groupId = Workflow | Attribute:'Group','Id' -%}
{%- assign locationId = Workflow | Attribute:'Location','Id' -%}
{%- assign scheduleId = Activity | Attribute:'Schedule','Id' -%}
{%- assign occurrenceId = Activity | Attribute:'OccurrenceId' -%}

{%- sql return:'Results' groupid:{{ groupId }} locationid:{{ locationId }} scheduleid:{{ scheduleId }} occurrenceid:{{ occurrenceId }} -%}
    WITH SlotsDesiredCTE AS (
        SELECT  gl.[GroupId] AS 'GroupId'
                , gl.[LocationId] AS 'LocationId'
                , glsc.[ScheduleId] AS 'ScheduleId'
                ,SUM(glsc.[DesiredCapacity]) AS 'SlotCount'
        FROM    [dbo].[Group] g
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocation] gl
            ON  gl.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND gl.[LocationId] = @locationid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Location] l
            ON  l.[Id] = gl.[LocationId]
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocationScheduleConfig] glsc
            ON  glsc.[GroupLocationId] = gl.[Id]
            AND glsc.[ScheduleId] = @scheduleid
        WHERE   g.[Id] = @groupid
            AND g.[IsActive] = 'true'
            AND g.[IsArchived] != 'true'
            AND g.[DisableScheduling] != 'true'
        GROUP BY gl.[GroupId]
                , gl.[LocationId]
                , glsc.[ScheduleId]
    ),

    SlotsFilledCTE AS (
        SELECT  gl.[GroupId] AS 'GroupId'
                , gl.[LocationId] AS 'LocationId'
                , glsc.[ScheduleId] AS 'ScheduleId'
                , COUNT(a.[Id]) AS 'SlotCount'
        FROM    [dbo].[Group] g
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocation] gl
            ON  gl.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND gl.[LocationId] = @locationid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Location] l
            ON  l.[Id] = gl.[LocationId]
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[GroupLocationScheduleConfig] glsc
            ON  glsc.[GroupLocationId] = gl.[Id]
            AND glsc.[ScheduleId] = @scheduleid
        INNER JOIN [dbo].[Schedule] s
            ON  s.[Id] = glsc.[ScheduleId]
            AND s.[Id] = @scheduleid
        LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[AttendanceOccurrence] ao
            ON  ao.[GroupId] = g.[Id]
            AND ao.[LocationId] = l.[Id]
            AND ao.[ScheduleId] = glsc.[ScheduleId]
            AND ao.[OccurrenceDate] = s.[EffectiveStartDate]
        LEFT OUTER JOIN [dbo].[Attendance] a
            ON  a.[OccurrenceId] = ao.[Id]
            AND a.[ScheduledToAttend] = 'true'
        WHERE   g.[Id] = @groupid
            AND g.[IsActive] = 'true'
            AND g.[IsArchived] != 'true'
            AND g.[DisableScheduling] != 'true'
        GROUP BY gl.[GroupId]
                , gl.[LocationId]
                , glsc.[ScheduleId]
    )

    SELECT  desiredCTE.SlotCount - filledCTE.SlotCount AS 'SlotsAvailable'
    FROM    SlotsDesiredCTE desiredCTE
    INNER JOIN  SlotsFilledCTE filledCTE
        ON  filledCTE.GroupId = desiredCTE.GroupId
        AND filledCTE.LocationId = desiredCTE.LocationId
        AND filledCTE.ScheduleId = desiredCTE.ScheduleId
{%- endsql -%}

{{- Results[0].SlotsAvailable | AsInteger -}}

Properties.Name: Send Confirmation Email [IF ServicesScheduled NOT Blank]
Active
Properties.Description: Should Service be used?

Properties.Name: Order
Properties.Description: The order that this service should be used (priority)

Properties.Name: From Name|From Name Attribute
Properties.Description: The name or an attribute that contains the person or name that email should be sent from.

Properties.Name: From Email Address|From Attribute
Properties.Description: The email address or an attribute that contains the person or email address that email should be sent from (will default to organization email).

Properties.Name: Reply To Address|Reply To Attribute
Properties.Description: The email address or an attribute that contains the person or email address that email replies should be sent to (will default to 'From' email).

Properties.Name: Send To Email Addresses|To Attribute
Properties.Description: The email addresses or an attribute that contains the person, email address, group or security role that the email should be sent to.

Properties.Name: Send to Group Role
Properties.Description: An optional Group Role attribute to limit recipients to if the 'Send to Email Addresses' is a group or security role.

Properties.Name: Subject
Properties.Description: The subject that should be used when sending email.

Properties.Value: Serve {{ Workflow | Attribute:'Holiday' }} - Sign Up Confirmation
Properties.PersistedTextValue: Serve {{ Workflow | Attribute:'Holiday' }} - Sign Up Confirmation
Properties.PersistedHtmlValue: Serve {{ Workflow | Attribute:'Holiday' }} - Sign Up Confirmation
Properties.PersistedCondensedTextValue: Serve {{ Workflow | Attribute:'Holiday' }} - Sign Up Confirmation
Properties.PersistedCondensedHtmlValue: Serve {{ Workflow | Attribute:'Holiday' }} - Sign Up Confirmation

Properties.Name: Body
Properties.Description: The body of the email that should be sent.

Properties.Name: CC Email Addresses|CC Attribute
Properties.Description: The email addresses or an attribute that contains the person, email address, group or security role that the email should be CC'd (carbon copied) to. Any address in this field will be copied on the email sent to every recipient.

Properties.Name: BCC Email Addresses|BCC Attribute
Properties.Description: The email addresses or an attribute that contains the person, email address, group or security role that the email should be BCC'd (blind carbon copied) to. Any address in this field will be copied on the email sent to every recipient.

Properties.Name: Attachment One
Properties.Description: Workflow attribute that contains the email attachment. Note file size that can be sent is limited by both the sending and receiving email services typically 10 - 25 MB.

Properties.Name: Attachment Two
Properties.Description: Workflow attribute that contains the email attachment. Note file size that can be sent is limited by both the sending and receiving email services typically 10 - 25 MB.

Properties.Description: Workflow attribute that contains the email attachment. Note file size that can be sent is limited by both the sending and receiving email services typically 10 - 25 MB.

Properties.Description: Should a record of this communication be saved to the recipient's profile?
